case_title: LAURENCE VINOCUR VS. CIRCLE GLASS LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR EXTENSION OF TIME TO APPLY FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 62602183) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VINOCUR, LAURENCE
STIPULATION TO CONTINUE HEARINGS ON PARTIES RESPECTIVE MOTIONS RE DEFAULT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100043768) FILED BY DEFENDANT CIRCLE GLASS LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CIRCLE GLASS LLC'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT OF CIRCLE GLASS LLC IS CONTINUED TO MAY 17, 2019 PER STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES. JUDGE: ETHAN SCHULMAN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)

UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF APR-30-2019 NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR A HEARING ON PLAINTIFFS APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST CIRCLE GLASS LLC - CONTINUED TO JUN-06-2019 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 514. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE DEFAULT IS PRESENTLY SET FOR MAY 17, 2019 IN DEPARTMENT 302. ADDITIONALLY, PLAINTIFF DID NOT PROVIDE D514 WITH COURTESY COPIES OF HIS REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF COURT JUDGMENT. NO APPEARANCE. NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: GAIL DEKREON. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).
